title: DASD-723 My Girlfriend Is An Intellectual Beautiful Girl Who Dreams Of Becoming A Novelist And She's Been Getting Impregnated And Fucked By My Dad Ami Kashiwagi
description: My girlfriend, Ami Kashiwagi, was the first girlfriend I met at university. She has a big dream of becoming a novelist and I want to support her, but I was worried because I knew her job as a novelist by looking at her father's back. One day, when I told her that my father was a novelist, I was begged to learn by all means and decided to introduce her.
